effects.description: Vulcanus rips a Barricade to shreds with three heavy bolts, dealing Attack * 280% damage and inflicting Bleed. Bleed deals Attack * 10% damage every 0.5s for 3s.
Vulcanus targets an enemy hero with a chained dart, dealing Attack * 140% damage, immobilizing and stuns the target for 2s.
Vulcanus shapes rage into resolve, increasing his Escorts’ Attack by 30% and Defense by 30%.
Vulcanus is skilled in the arts of terror and manipulation, reducing all enemy troops’ Attack by 20%.

effects.effect-name: Extra Attack Damage and Increase Enemy Damage Taken
effects.description: There’s no steel like the blades in the Vulcanus’ armory, empowering all troops to deal 100% extra damage after every 5 attacks, increasing damage taken for the target by 15% in the next attack.

effects.effect-name: Reduce Enemy Defense and Increase Attack
effects.description: Vulcanus’ modified armor-piercing arrows reduce enemy Infantry and Lancer Defense by 60% for 3 turns and increase our Marksmen’s Attack by 60% for 1 turn.

exploration.ability: Reforged in the Undercity workshops, the arrowheads of Vulcanus now inflict Bleed on all targets for all damage done. Bleed deals Attack * 20% damage every 0.5 seconds for 3 seconds.
exploration.name: Laceration

expedition.ability: The sense of confidence and unstoppable momentum of Vulcanus increases the Attack of rallied Troop by 15%.
expedition.name: Born King
